violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of underneath the reach-in unit have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. Area to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gap poster provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The floor and wall junctures in various areas do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The coving in the back prep area near exit door is in poor repair (Visible gap.) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
